title: Just Needed Recipes
description: just adds a few recipes that I feel should be in the game that aren't in my other mods
body: This mod adds recipes that I feel should be added to the game. my goal is to make a recipe for every **(excluding some items like the _elytra_)**. as time goes on more recipes will be added and more thing will be easy to get and possibly renewable. most recipes use the crafting table but some use other might use the brewing stand or the furnace. the mod is simple to use, just download it, since it has no dependencies.
